command:
BACKUP_DIR=/home/jose/agent-backups-$(date +%Y%m%d)

echo "=== Copy to vm-backups (.192) ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.192 "mkdir -p /home/jose/agent-backups" 2>/dev/null
scp -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no $BACKUP_DIR/*.tar.gz jose@192.168.0.192:/home/jose/agent-backups/ 2>/dev/null
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.192 "ls -la /home/jose/agent-backups/" 2>/dev/null
echo "Copied to vm-backups"

echo "=== Base64 of tarballs for GitHub upload ==="
echo "SAKURA_B64_START"
base64 -w0 $BACKUP_DIR/sakura-full.tar.gz
echo ""
echo "SAKURA_B64_END"
echo "REMY_B64_START"
base64 -w0 $BACKUP_DIR/remy-backup.tar.gz
echo ""
echo "REMY_B64_END"
